title: Log user greeting to chat log
reason: The user said hi. Every first contact deserves a permanent record in world/chat.jsonl, our chat history.
planned_changes: Append a new JSON line to world/chat.jsonl containing an object with keys: timestamp (ISO 8601), role: 'user', content: 'hi there'
risk: low — appending to a log file is safe, reversible, and trivially verifiable
checks: Read world/chat.jsonl to confirm the new line is present and valid JSON
Ensure the previous lines remain unchanged
